scripts.build:browser: esbuild packages/sdk-runtime/src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/sdk-runtime.esm.js && esbuild packages/sdk-runtime/src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=AbRuntime --outfile=dist/sdk-runtime.iife.js && esbuild packages/sdk-editor/src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=AbEditor --outfile=dist/sdk-editor.iife.js
